concerns.text: SC-010 (Phase 2+) explicitly requires 'Validation results documented in `docs/reproducibility/algorithm_validation.md`' but this file is NOT listed in the plan's Project Structure. All other SC file requirements (SC-001, SC-005, SC-007, SC-008, SC-011, SC-012, SC-013, SC-014) are listed in the Project Structure. Add algorithm_validation.md to ensure complete spec coverage for Phase 2+ algorithm validation.

FR-006/SC-009 require reporting correlation coefficients and descriptive comparison metrics (mean difference, variance ratio, Cohen's d) for alternating vs. non-alternating groups, but no dedicated output file is specified in the Project Structure. While results could be part of existing reports (e.g., data_quality_report.md), the plan should explicitly document where these metrics will be recorded for traceability.

FR-010/SC-006 require logging counts of knots with ambiguous alternating classification that are excluded or marked unclassifiable. The spec says 'with count logged' but no dedicated file is specified in the Project Structure. Consider adding to data_quality_report.md or creating a dedicated log file for explicit traceability.

The Dataset Strategy table claims 'NO verified source found' for Knot Atlas, KnotInfo, and OEIS A002863. However, spec.md FR-001 and SC-001 do cite these URLs (https://katlas.org, https://knotinfo.org/, https://oeis.org/A002863). This documentation inconsistency should be corrected to reference the spec's verified URLs rather than stating they are unavailable in this planning context.

States '~9988 prime knots (crossing number ≤ 13), ~100MB total dataset size' without explicitly citing OEIS A002863 in this location. While spec.md does cite this source, the plan should reference the source for dataset size claims to follow the convention of citing sources rather than asserting empirical values.

contracts/ directory in Project Structure only lists knot_record.schema.yaml, but spec.md and data-model.md reference three contracts (knot_record, dataset, regression_model). For complete spec coverage traceability, the plan should list all three contract schemas in the contracts/ directory.

tests/contract/ only lists test_knot_record_schema.py, but there should be corresponding tests for dataset.schema.yaml and regression_model.schema.yaml for complete contract validation coverage per spec requirements.

Scale/Scope states '~9988 prime knots (crossing number ≤ 13)'. OEIS A002863 lists 9988 as the count *at* crossing number 13, not *up to* 13 (cumulative is ~12965). This factual error in the census definition affects the dataset size claim in the plan.

responses.response: Added algorithm_validation.md to the docs/reproducibility/ directory listing in Project Structure to satisfy SC-010 (Phase 2+) requirement.
responses.what_changed: Added algorithm_validation.md to Project Structure docs/reproducibility/ section

responses.response: Added correlation_metrics.md to the docs/reproducibility/ directory listing to explicitly document where correlation coefficients and comparison metrics for alternating vs. non-alternating groups will be recorded.
responses.what_changed: Added correlation_metrics.md to Project Structure docs/reproducibility/ section

responses.response: Added ambiguous_classification_log.md to the docs/reproducibility/ directory listing to explicitly document where counts of knots with ambiguous alternating classification will be logged per FR-010/SC-006.
responses.what_changed: Added ambiguous_classification_log.md to Project Structure docs/reproducibility/ section

responses.response: Updated Dataset Strategy table in research.md to cite the verified URLs from spec.md (https://katlas.org, https://knotinfo.org/, https://oeis.org/A002863) instead of claiming no verified source found.
responses.what_changed: Updated Dataset Strategy table URLs in research.md

responses.response: Added OEIS A002863 citation to the Technical Context Scale/Scope section in plan.md where the 9988 figure is stated.
responses.what_changed: Added OEIS A002863 citation to Technical Context in plan.md

responses.response: Updated contracts/ directory listing in Project Structure to include all three contract schemas (knot_record.schema.yaml, dataset.schema.yaml, regression_model.schema.yaml) as referenced in spec.md and data-model.md.
responses.what_changed: Added dataset.schema.yaml and regression_model.schema.yaml to contracts/ listing in plan.md

responses.response: Updated tests/contract/ directory listing in Project Structure to include test files for all three schemas (test_knot_record_schema.py, test_dataset_schema.py, test_regression_model_schema.py).
responses.what_changed: Added test_dataset_schema.py and test_regression_model_schema.py to tests/contract/ listing in plan.md

responses.response: Corrected the factual error in Technical Context Scale/Scope: OEIS A002863 lists 9988 as the count AT crossing number 13, not cumulative up to 13. Updated to state '9988 prime knots at crossing number 13 (per OEIS A002863), with cumulative count up to 13 crossings approximately 12965'.
responses.what_changed: Corrected knot count description in Technical Context to distinguish AT vs cumulative crossing numbers
